Definition: A version control system that tracks changes in computer files and coordinates work on those files among multiple people.
A cloud-based platform for hosting and managing Git repositories, enabling collaboration and version control.
The practice of tracking and managing changes to software code over time to ensure a history of edits and facilitate collaboration.
